creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

$USE_RC_SUBR should take care of temp pkg-plist for rc scripts. 

In my environment, package for net-snmp contains rc.d/snmpd and rc.d/snmptrapd 
files. 

Please check your generate package with "grep etc/rc.d net-snmp-5.4.1.2.tbz"
